ModMetadata.Name: Satellite Pad Index
ModMetadata.Author: Vespinian
ModMetadata.Description:
A plugin mod that adds extended Landingpad selection to Satellite Dishes.
Uses BepInEx with StationeersLaunchPad. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
The TargetPadIndex logic type now looks up Landingpad Data and Power Structures by Reference ID for easier pad selection.
- Values 0-10: Vanilla behavior (selects by list index) - Values 11+: Value is treated as a "Landingpad Data and Power" Reference ID, the patch code of this plugin then tries to find that ID in the structures connected to the pads in the satellite's pad list defaulting to vanilla behavior if nothing is found.
Repo: https://github.com/Vespinian/stationeers-pad-index
ModMetadata.InGameDescription:
<size="30"><color=#ffa500> Satellite Pad Index </color></size> A plugin mod that adds extended Landingpad selection to Satellite Dishes.
Uses BepInEx with StationeersLaunchPad. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
The TargetPadIndex logic type now looks up Landingpad Data and Power Structures by Reference ID for easier pad selection.
- Values 0-10: Vanilla behavior (selects by list index) - Values 11+: Value is treated as a "Landingpad Data and Power" Reference ID, the patch code of this plugin then tries to find that ID in the structures connected to the pads in the satellite's pad list defaulting to vanilla behavior if nothing is found.
Repo: https://github.com/Vespinian/stationeers-pad-index
